Mother In-Law Knows Best

My encounters with my future mother In-Law

I met my girlfriend Mandy when I was young. She was beautiful then, as she is beautiful today. Mandy is short, only five feet one, with nice, thirty-four A tits. She has blonde hair. We got on well, and her parents looked after me. Her father would teach me practical things, such as building and decorating. I used to go on holidays with them in their Tourer Caravan.
